heroHeadline: Xi Jinping Meets KMT Chair Cheng Li-wun in Beijing — First CPC-KMT Leader Summit in ~10 Years; Xi: 'Taiwan Independence Is Chief Culprit'; PLA 6 Sorties Apr 9
heroSubtitle: Xi-Cheng summit at Great Hall of the People Apr 10 confirms; Xi warns Taiwan independence 'will never be tolerated'; Cheng calls for 'reconciliation'; Taiwan DPP/MAC condemn meeting as bypassing democratic mandate; PLA surged to 6 sorties Apr 9 (5 crossing median line) ahead of Beijing summit — sharp uptick from 2 on Apr 8; 34 days to Trump-Xi summit (May 14-15); Taiwan defense budget stalemate continues
footerNote: Data sourced from Taiwan MND, US DoD, DSCA, CSIS ChinaPower, Global Taiwan Institute, AIT, Reuters, AP, Bloomberg, NPR, Taipei Times, Focus Taiwan, Nikkei Asia, Japan Times, ANI News, Vision Times, South China Morning Post, Taiwan News, Asia Times, The Asia Cable, GlobalSecurity.org, Xinhua, CGTN, The Diplomat, Washington Times, Global Times, People's Daily Online, Al Jazeera, and institutional analyses. All claims reflect multi-pole sourcing across Western, East Asian, and international media.
